context: Tests whether the agent uses the ICE scoring framework with the correct interface shape and formula, implements a revenue impact calculator with the correct parameters, documents the max-3-concurrent-experiments constraint and statistical rigor requirements, and tracks revenue per visitor as a success metric.

checklist.name: ICE interface fields
checklist.description: Defines an experiment data structure with at least three separate numeric fields for impact, confidence, and ease (not a single combined score field)

checklist.name: ICE score is product
checklist.description: Computes the ICE score as the product (multiplication) of impact, confidence, and ease — not a sum, average, or weighted sum

checklist.name: ICE sorts descending
checklist.description: Ranks experiments in descending order of ICE score (highest score first)

checklist.name: ICE scale 1-5
checklist.description: Uses a 1-to-5 scale for each ICE dimension (not 1-10, 0-100, or percentages)

checklist.name: Revenue impact function
checklist.description: Implements a revenue impact calculation that takes at minimum: visitor count, current CVR, expected CVR lift, and average order value as inputs

checklist.name: Revenue impact outputs lift
checklist.description: The revenue impact function returns or prints both monthly and annual revenue lift (not just current vs. new revenue)

checklist.name: Max 3 concurrent experiments
checklist.description: experiment-guidance.md explicitly states that no more than 3 experiments should run simultaneously (or equivalent warning about concurrent test interference)

checklist.name: Pre-calculated sample size
checklist.description: experiment-guidance.md mentions setting a minimum detectable effect or pre-calculating required sample size before launching a test (not stopping 'when it looks significant')

checklist.name: Fixed test duration
checklist.description: experiment-guidance.md advises using a fixed experiment duration based on statistical power, not peeking and stopping early when results look promising

checklist.name: Revenue per visitor metric
checklist.description: experiment-guidance.md recommends tracking revenue per visitor (not CVR alone) as a success metric, noting that CVR gains can be offset by AOV drops

checklist.name: Express payments included
checklist.description: The experiment backlog includes an experiment for express/wallet payment methods (Apple Pay, Google Pay, or equivalent) and it receives a high ICE score

checklist.name: Guest checkout experiment
checklist.description: The experiment for removing forced account registration (guest checkout) is included in the backlog and ranks near the top of the prioritized list

checklist.name: Hypothesis field
checklist.description: Each experiment entry includes a hypothesis statement (not just a name/title) describing the expected outcome
